text: Hi, I'm Ekta Choudhury, Miss India Universe 2009.
Join me in preparing for long distance running with celebrity trainer Sandeep Sachdev.
Hi and welcome. Today Ekta and I are going to demonstrate a whole lot of tips, exercises and strategies on helping you making running a part of your life.
Sandeep, what do I do if I get cramps while running?
Well, this is one of the most common things to happen for runners while they are doing a long distance run.
So obviously, you have to always be in the habit of sipping water whenever you are training.
Whether it's training for a long distance run, whether it's doing any form of training.
But obviously, specifically to the marathon,
say you are at any juncture in the marathon,
make sure that you are sipping water say every 2.5 to 3 kilometers.
If you feel cramped up at any particular spot,
just make sure that with all your knowledge and all your training,
you know what kind of a stretch you need to do.
And if you feel that you need a stretch from some secondary person,
just stop somebody, request them to listen,
I need a back stretch, can you just help me out?
All runners are helpers.
So that's it.
TIP 3
Don't get stressed.
Don't get stressed,
because running is the best way to get your energy back.
Super.
All runners are helpers.
On that note, I'm going to ask him for another tip.
Breakfast and lunch guys are the most important meals of your day.
Whether you are training for the marathon
or whether you are not training for a marathon,
make sure your breakfast and lunches are good.
And trust me,
And trust me, you will always remain fit for life and you will always keep running.
